name: Washing Machine
description: Family has five children (three biological children aged 4 months, 2 years, and 5 years, and two nieces aged 5 years and 16 years). They live in a 2-room rental flat in Punggol. The household’s existing washing machine is in poor condition and takes approximately 10 hours to complete a single wash cycle, which is challenging given the large volume of laundry generated by the household. With the anticipated increase in household members, a replacement washing machine is urgently needed to support the family’s daily living needs. It would be greatly appreciated if the donor is able to provide delivery to the family’s home, as the Client has limited capacity to arrange transport due to caregiving responsibilities and financial constraints.
